task_completion.description: Verify Stellarium is configured for Abbottabad, Pakistan (34.17° N, 73.24° E, Altitude: 1200 m).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window or the bottom status bar displays 'Abbottabad' or coordinates matching approximately 34°10'N, 73°14'E and an altitude of 1200m.

task_completion.description: Verify Stellarium is set to May 1, 2011, at 18:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date/Time window or bottom status bar shows the date as 2011-05-01 and the time corresponding to 18:00:00 UTC (accounting for any displayed timezone offsets).

task_completion.description: Verify the azimuthal coordinate grid is enabled in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular Azimuth/Altitude grid is visibly overlaid on the sky in the Stellarium viewport.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot was captured showing the Sun's position relative to the horizon and azimuthal grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file (viewed in an image viewer or file manager) or Stellarium viewport shows the Sun, the horizon line, and the azimuthal grid.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot was captured showing the Moon's position relative to the horizon and azimuthal grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file (viewed in an image viewer or file manager) or Stellarium viewport shows the Moon, the horizon line, and the azimuthal grid.

task_completion.description: Verify the tactical illumination report was written to the correct path with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows a file named 'illumination_report.txt' on the Desktop containing the operation date (May 1, 2011), location (Abbottabad), and the recorded altitude/elevation values for both the Sun and the Moon.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Stellarium GUI to find the information rather than looking it up online.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Stellarium application interface being interacted with, not just a web browser with search results.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshots are actual captures from the Stellarium software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots of the Sun and Moon should contain Stellarium-specific UI elements (like the top-left information text when a celestial body is selected or the bottom toolbar).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent wrote the report based on its own observations in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The altitude/elevation values in the text report should match the values visible in the Stellarium screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Operation Neptune Spear location is Abbottabad, Pakistan (34.17° N, 73.24° E). The required date/time is May 1, 2011, at 18:00 UTC. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/illumination_report.txt and screenshots should be saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
